2026-04-23T01:30:46.2341709Z ##[group]Run # Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)
2026-04-23T01:30:46.2342291Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-23T01:30:46.2342724Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-23T01:30:46.2343096Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-23T01:30:46.2343416Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-23T01:30:46.2343654Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-23T01:30:46.2343816Z [36;1mPORT=3001[0m
2026-04-23T01:30:46.2344001Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-23T01:30:46.2344169Z [36;1m# Set outputs for next steps[0m
2026-04-23T01:30:46.2344404Z [36;1m{[0m

2026-04-23T01:30:46.2344901Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_port=${PORT}"[0m
2026-04-23T01:30:46.2345180Z [36;1m} >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"[0m

2026-04-23T01:31:50.1736344Z {"timestamp":"2026-04-23T01:31:36.447961963Z","direction":"OUT","type":"REQUEST","server_id":"github","method":"tools/call","payload":{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"arguments":{"issue_number":"58534","method":"get","owner":"Azure","repo":"azure-sdk-for-net"},"name":"issue_read"}}}
2026-04-23T01:31:50.1752719Z {"timestamp":"2026-04-23T01:31:36.763638886Z","direction":"IN","type":"RESPONSE","server_id":"github","payload":{"id":1,"jsonrpc":"2.0","result":{"content":[{"text":"{\"number\":58534,\"title\":\"Replace legacy Microsoft.DotNet.ApiCompat with modern .NET SDK PackageValidation / ApiCompat\",\"body\":\"## Summary\\n\\nThe repo currently uses the legacy `Microsoft.DotNet.ApiCompat` 5.0.0-beta.20467.1 (from 2020) — wired up in `eng/Directory.Build.Common.targets` via the `ValidateApiCompatForSrc` target — to enforce API compatibility against the previously shipped baseline package.\\n\\nThis legacy task is missing rules that have been added to the modern `Microsoft.DotNet.ApiCompat` shipped in the .NET SDK, most notably:\\n\\n- **CP0017** — `EnableRuleCannotChangeParameterName`: detects parameter-name renames on public APIs. These are source-breaking for callers using named arguments and currently slip through CI silently.\\n\\nWe hit this while reviewing [#57068](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/pull/57068) (DnsResolver TypeSpec migration), where parameter renames on `CreateResourceIdentifier` were not flagged by the existing ApiCompat baseline check and only surfaced through manual API review.\\n\\n## Proposal\\n\\nMigrate the repo-wide ApiCompat infrastructure off the legacy NuGet task and onto the modern .NET SDK feature, in `eng/Directory.Build.Common.targets`:\\n\\n- Use the modern `Microsoft.DotNet.ApiCompat` shipped with the .NET SDK (either `true` + `$(ApiCompatVersion)`, or invoke `Microsoft.DotNet.ApiCompat.Task.ValidateAssembliesTask` directly).\\n- **Run validation during `dotnet build`, not only `dotnet pack`** — the existing legacy `ValidateApiCompatForSrc` target runs on build (`TargetsTriggeredByCompilation`), and the replacement must preserve that behavior so contributors get fast feedback on every build (CI doesn\\u0026#39;t run `pack` on PR validation). The default `EnablePackageValidation` flow is wired `AfterTargets=\\u0026#34;Pack\\u0026#34;`, so it must be re-hooked to run after `CoreCompile` / `Build` against the obj-path assembly.\\n- Enable additional rules including `ApiCompatEnableRuleCannotChangeParameterName` by default.\\n- Remove the legacy `PackageDownload` + `PackageReference Include=\\u0026#34;Microsoft.DotNet.ApiCompat\\u0026#34;` block (the modern path adds its own `PackageDownload` for the baseline; both together trigger `NU1505`).\\n- Migrate any existing baselines under `eng/apicompatbaselines/*.txt` to the new suppression-file format.\\n\\n## Workaround in place\\n\\nFor `Azure.ResourceManager.DnsResolver` (PR #57068), the modern `ValidateAssembliesTask` is wired up locally in the package `.csproj` (running `AfterTargets=\\u0026#34;ValidateApiCompatForSrc\\u0026#34;`) to surface `CP0017` during `dotnet build` alongside the legacy check, as a stop-gap until the repo-wide fix lands.\\n\\n## Acceptance\\n\\n- All packages with `ApiCompatVersion` set automatically get parameter-rename detection via the modern ApiCompat.\\n- Validation runs on `dotnet build` (not only on `dotnet pack`), matching the current legacy behavior.\\n- The package-local workaround in `sdk/dnsresolver/Azure.ResourceManager.DnsResolver/src/Azure.ResourceManager.DnsResolver.csproj` can be reverted.\\n- No NU1505 warnings, no duplicate baseline downloads.\\n- Existing baselines continue to suppress the same set of pre-approved breaks.\",\"state\":\"open\",\"html_url\":\"https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/issues/58534\",\"user\":{\"login\":\"live1206\",\"id\":5196139,\"profile_url\":\"https://github.com/live1206\",\"avatar_url\":\"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/5196139?v=4\"},\"author_association\":\"MEMBER\",\"labels\":[\"EngSys\"],\"reactions\":{\"total_count\":1,\"+1\":0,\"-1\":0,\"laugh\":0,\"confused\":0,\"heart\":0,\"hooray\":0,\"rocket\":0,\"eyes\":1},\"created_at\":\"2026-04-23T01:29:18Z\",\"updated_at\":\"2026-04-23T01:29:53Z\"}","type":"text"}]}}}
2026-04-23T01:31:50.1766798Z {"timestamp":"2026-04-23T01:31:36.774980132Z","direction":"OUT","type":"REQUEST","server_id":"github","method":"tools/call","payload":{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"arguments":{"issue_number":58534,"method":"get","owner":"Azure","repo":"azure-sdk-for-net"},"name":"issue_read"}}}
2026-04-23T01:31:50.1783336Z {"timestamp":"2026-04-23T01:31:36.966139975Z","direction":"IN","type":"RESPONSE","server_id":"github","payload":{"id":1,"jsonrpc":"2.0","result":{"content":[{"text":"{\"number\":58534,\"title\":\"Replace legacy Microsoft.DotNet.ApiCompat with modern .NET SDK PackageValidation / ApiCompat\",\"body\":\"## Summary\\n\\nThe repo currently uses the legacy `Microsoft.DotNet.ApiCompat` 5.0.0-beta.20467.1 (from 2020) — wired up in `eng/Directory.Build.Common.targets` via the `ValidateApiCompatForSrc` target — to enforce API compatibility against the previously shipped baseline package.\\n\\nThis legacy task is missing rules that have been added to the modern `Microsoft.DotNet.ApiCompat` shipped in the .NET SDK, most notably:\\n\\n- **CP0017** — `EnableRuleCannotChangeParameterName`: detects parameter-name renames on public APIs. These are source-breaking for callers using named arguments and currently slip through CI silently.\\n\\nWe hit this while reviewing [#57068](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/pull/57068) (DnsResolver TypeSpec migration), where parameter renames on `CreateResourceIdentifier` were not flagged by the existing ApiCompat baseline check and only surfaced through manual API review.\\n\\n## Proposal\\n\\nMigrate the repo-wide ApiCompat infrastructure off the legacy NuGet task and onto the modern .NET SDK feature, in `eng/Directory.Build.Common.targets`:\\n\\n- Use the modern `Microsoft.DotNet.ApiCompat` shipped with the .NET SDK (either `true` + `$(ApiCompatVersion)`, or invoke `Microsoft.DotNet.ApiCompat.Task.ValidateAssembliesTask` directly).\\n- **Run validation during `dotnet build`, not only `dotnet pack`** — the existing legacy `ValidateApiCompatForSrc` target runs on build (`TargetsTriggeredByCompilation`), and the replacement must preserve that behavior so contributors get fast feedback on every build (CI doesn\\u0026#39;t run `pack` on PR validation). The default `EnablePackageValidation` flow is wired `AfterTargets=\\u0026#34;Pack\\u0026#34;`, so it must be re-hooked to run after `CoreCompile` / `Build` against the obj-path assembly.\\n- Enable additional rules including `ApiCompatEnableRuleCannotChangeParameterName` by default.\\n- Remove the legacy `PackageDownload` + `PackageReference Include=\\u0026#34;Microsoft.DotNet.ApiCompat\\u0026#34;` block (the modern path adds its own `PackageDownload` for the baseline; both together trigger `NU1505`).\\n- Migrate any existing baselines under `eng/apicompatbaselines/*.txt` to the new suppression-file format.\\n\\n## Workaround in place\\n\\nFor `Azure.ResourceManager.DnsResolver` (PR #57068), the modern `ValidateAssembliesTask` is wired up locally in the package `.csproj` (running `AfterTargets=\\u0026#34;ValidateApiCompatForSrc\\u0026#34;`) to surface `CP0017` during `dotnet build` alongside the legacy check, as a stop-gap until the repo-wide fix lands.\\n\\n## Acceptance\\n\\n- All packages with `ApiCompatVersion` set automatically get parameter-rename detection via the modern ApiCompat.\\n- Validation runs on `dotnet build` (not only on `dotnet pack`), matching the current legacy behavior.\\n- The package-local workaround in `sdk/dnsresolver/Azure.ResourceManager.DnsResolver/src/Azure.ResourceManager.DnsResolver.csproj` can be reverted.\\n- No NU1505 warnings, no duplicate baseline downloads.\\n- Existing baselines continue to suppress the same set of pre-approved breaks.\",\"state\":\"open\",\"html_url\":\"https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/issues/58534\",\"user\":{\"login\":\"live1206\",\"id\":5196139,\"profile_url\":\"https://github.com/live1206\",\"avatar_url\":\"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/5196139?v=4\"},\"author_association\":\"MEMBER\",\"labels\":[\"EngSys\"],\"reactions\":{\"total_count\":1,\"+1\":0,\"-1\":0,\"laugh\":0,\"confused\":0,\"heart\":0,\"hooray\":0,\"rocket\":0,\"eyes\":1},\"created_at\":\"2026-04-23T01:29:18Z\",\"updated_at\":\"2026-04-23T01:29:53Z\"}","type":"text"}]}}}
